raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a defective table from XXXX using my Macys American Express card. The table weighed close to XXXX pounds and arrived damaged/defective, including alignment and assembly issues. I requested a return accommodation or pickup because the item was extremely heavy and not reasonably transportable by a consumer vehicle. 

XXXX refused to provide pickup assistance and instead required me to personally transport the table to a return location. I contacted both XXXX and Macys American Express multiple times and provided documentation, photos, and communication records showing the item was defective and that the merchant would not provide a reasonable return method. 

Despite this, the dispute was not properly resolved. I requested clarification and supporting documentation regarding the denial and handling of the dispute. I believe the dispute investigation failed to reasonably consider the size and nature of the item, the lack of pickup accommodation, and the merchants return requirements for an extremely heavy product.
